zh.lifeSummary: 當Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM於1075年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫比特格-艾阿-德勒時，他的父親Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM45歲，母親Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN36歲。他於大約1110年與Y van Gent在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫代音比特格-艾阿-德勒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1135年在希臘阿提卡尼卡亞享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM于1075年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫比特格-艾阿-德勒时，他的父亲Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM45岁，母亲Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN36岁。他于大约1110年与Y van Gent在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫代音比特格-艾阿-德勒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1135年在希腊阿提卡尼卡亞享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: VAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Engelbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

variants.name: Engelbrecht
meanings: from engel (representing Ingal, from Ing, the name of a Germanic god), Angel ‘Angle’, or engel ‘angel’ + berht ‘bright’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM was born in 1075, in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM, was 45 and his mother, Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, was 36. He married Y van Gent about 1110, in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1135, in Níkaia, Attica, Greece, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM est né en 1075, à Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Y van Gent environ 1110, à Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1135, à Níkaia, Attica, Grèce, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM 1075 in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM 45 und seine Mutter Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN 36. Er hat um 1110 in Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Ostflandern, Belgien Y van Gent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1135 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Níkaia, Attica, Griechenland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM è nato il nel 1075 nel Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Y van Gent circa 1110, nel Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1135, nel Níkaia, Attica, Grecia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEMが1075年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンペテジェム-アーン-デ-レイで生まれた時，父Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEMは45歳，母Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPINは36歳であった。約1110年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンデインズペテジェム-アーン-デ-レイでY van Gentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1135年にギリシャアッティカンiケアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM(이)가 1075년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 피테그-아아-데-레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 데인즈 피테그-아아-데-레이에서 Y van Gent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 그리스 애티카 i카이아에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM nasceu em 1075, em Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Y van Gent aproximadamente 1110, em Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1135, em Níkaia, Attica, Grécia, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM родился в 1075 г. в местности питегем-аан-де-ли, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Y van Gent около 1110 г. в местности питегем-аан-де-ли, динз, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1135 г. в местности нiкеиа, аттика, Греция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Engelbert IV VAN PETEGHEM nació en 1075, en Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Ingelbrecht III VAN PETEGHEM, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mathilde DU BEC-CRESPIN, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Y van Gent aproximadamente 1110, en Petegem-aan-de-Leie, Deinze, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1135, en Níkaia, Attica, Grecia, a la edad de 60 años.
